/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/ifopt_core-test.dir/test/composite_test.cc.o CMakeFiles/ifopt_core-test.dir/test/problem_test.cc.o -o ifopt_core-test  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jin/harco/ecvt2_ws/build/ifopt/ifopt_core: libifopt_core.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
